title: Dark Sky Photography Field Session
description: A guided night session built around composition planning, low-light camera setup, and safe movement through remote terrain.
summary: Night-sky field instruction with small-group pacing and remote-terrain prep.
instructorBio: Chuck focuses on field-ready dark-sky shooting plans that respect weather, mobility needs, and low-connectivity realities.
specialInstructions: Bring layers, red-light mode on devices, and a tripod if you have one.
